overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown area. The player moves along a curved modern building with neon advertisements, approaching an open plaza with palm trees and concrete stairs under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian street with elevated transit ramp

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved building facade toward the distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the distance toward the plaza

entered.detail: smooth white curved building exterior with teal accent lighting along the base
green elevated highway or monorail track running above the street
tall palm trees lining the left side of the pedestrian walkway
blue neon signage visible in the distance between the skyscrapers
tall futuristic glass and steel towers with multiple levels and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic pedestrian street. A curved modern building with teal accent lighting dominates the right side, while palm trees line the left. In the distance, towering glass skyscrapers rise against a clear blue sky, with a green elevated transit ramp visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with large digital advertisements

events.description: curved building facade reveals large vertical digital billboard as camera turns right

agents.ego_description: turning right while walking to follow the curve of the building and approach the plaza

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying animated character advertisements
sleek black modern street lamp with angular design
landscaped trees and greenery in the raised plaza area ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a wider plaza area. A massive curved digital billboard displaying animated characters becomes visible on the right building facade. The elevated transit ramp and palm trees recede to the left while landscaped vegetation appears in the center distance, and a modern lamppost comes into view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach with concrete stairs and landscaped tiers

events.description: camera completes right turn and continues walking straight toward the plaza stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward the concrete stairs and raised plaza area with landscaped vegetation

notable_agents.action: standing near the plaza stairs in the distance

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to the raised plaza level on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the raised plaza area, with concrete stairs becoming prominent on the left. The large digital billboard and curved building facade now fill the right side of the frame at close range. The elevated highway and palm trees have passed out of view, while the landscaped plaza vegetation and stairs grow larger as the camera advances toward the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a futuristic pedestrian street that gradually opens into a wide, modern urban plaza. It begins by walking past a curved building with teal accent lighting and palm trees, with towering glass skyscrapers and a green elevated transit ramp visible under a clear blue sky. As the camera turns right, the view expands to reveal a massive animated digital billboard on the building's facade while the transit ramp and palm trees recede into the distance. The scene then shifts toward a raised plaza area where concrete stairs and landscaped vegetation become prominent in the foreground. Finally, the camera advances toward the intersection, bringing the large digital billboard and the curved architecture into close range as the surrounding street elements fade from view.
